channel.title: Humphrey P. K. Addy — Blog
channel.description: Notes on genomics, microbial ecology, and data-driven biology.

item.title: Microbiome visualisation in R
item.description: Practical recipes for plotting microbiome data in R — stacked bars that don't lie, ordinations that read at a glance, and tidy taxa wrangling.

item.title: The importance of file naming in bioinformatics
item.description: File-naming conventions are critical for reproducibility and pipeline stability. Here's how I automated naming checks across a lab's shared drives.
